channel.title: Web Development on Memo
channel.description: Recent content in Web Development on Memo

item.title: Web Development
item.description: Web Development # Source Code # How to post the source code with syntax highlighting. Gist # Using GitHub Gist, you can put the source code by simply pasting Script tags. Copy the tag in the upper right corner of the Gist repository and paste it into the body to insert the source code. <script src="https://gist.github.com/Forest0923/dad279ab557ae30bc51e4a9d8cf5bd7d.js"></script> prism.js # prism.js is a syntax highlighting tool implemented in JavaScript.
